ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Due Date
ham.body:
Dear Student,

I hope you are doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the semester project submission deadline is fast approaching. Please make sure you submit your project report and presentation slides by **Wednesday, 22nd October** at 5:00 PM via the university portal.

If you have any questions or need an extension, feel free to reach out to me or the course coordinator.

Best regards,
Prof. Sharma

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Take Immediate Action
spam.body:
Hello,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious transactions. To prevent a permanent lockout, please verify your account by clicking on the link below:

<URL>

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your wallet will be permanently disabled.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Best,
Crypto Security Team
